title: selaginella burkei var. burkei
intro: Selaginella burkei var. burkei, also known as African spikenard or Zulu rush, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in wound healing, pain relief, and immune system support. The plant is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antacid. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional African medicine to promote overall well-being.
